allowed_read_scope: Public competition listings and rules/overview pages only. Capture prize route, deadline, dataset access gate, evaluation metric, and account/submission requirements.
forbidden_actions: No login, signup, competition join, dataset download, notebook submit, acceptance of rules, payment, or public action.
evidence_needed: A local AI/ML competition shortlist with deadlines, prize route, dataset gate, baseline feasibility, and service requests needed before participation.
